summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was provided or invented. Security-shaped refs identified by deterministic validation are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions; unrelated refs remain non-mutating independent inventory items because merge, fix, raise_pr, and low-signal closeout are disabled. The remaining listed candidates that were not present in the compacted preflight artifact receive conservative independent classifications with null or supplied timestamps and no mutation.
